---
title: "Draft Quarto document"
author: "Your Name"
format: html
---

## Header 1

```{r setup}
source(here::here("R/functions.R"))
```


## Prepare HR data. 
```{r}
hr_data <- read_all("HR.csv.gz") |>
  get_participant_id() |>
  summarise_by_datetime()
```


## Prepare ibi data
```{r}
hr_data <- read_all("HR.csv.gz") |>
  get_participant_id() |>
  summarise_by_datetime()
```

## Prepare temp data
```{r}
temp_data <- read_all("TEMP.csv.gz") |>
  get_participant_id() |>
  summarise_by_datetime()
```


## Prepare bvp data
```{r}
bvp_data <- read_all("BVP.csv.gz") |>
  get_participant_id() |>
  summarise_by_datetime()
```


## Prepare eda data
```{r}
eda_data <- read_all("EDA.csv.gz") |>
  get_participant_id() |>
  summarise_by_datetime()
```
